extra.reason: Implemented: (1) staleness gate returns 409 market_data_stale when cached prices lag last_completed_trading_day, (2) manual scans now run cache_only (no yfinance fallback), (3) verified per-market queue parallelism works (US/HK on separate workers), (4) CLAUDE.md updated, (5) 3 new tests added.

Implemented: breadth + IBD group rankings now fan out for US/HK/JP/TW/IN via MarketTaxonomyService bridge; added market column + alembic migration; swapped NYSE-only market_hours for per-market MarketCalendarService; 52 affected tests green (163 broader regression sweep also green).
Implemented explicit allow-stale bootstrap path for static-site daily price seeding, with tests.
Completed resumable sharded CN daily price workflow
Addressed CN workflow code review findings: branch-safe release publishing, per-batch checkpoints, date validation, and checkpoint manifest verification
Addressed PR 175 review feedback: durable pinned CN weekly reference plan and date-object completeness comparison
Fixed missing GH_TOKEN/GH_REPO env for CN shard checkpoint uploads
Fixed CN combine coverage failure by keeping BJSE on AKShare and allowing stale-present rows in final export
Added explicit CN final bundle coverage threshold so bootstrap combine tolerates provider gaps while preserving strict defaults

Captured static-site page tour GIF via Playwright + ffmpeg + gifski. Output at docs/gifs/static-site-tour.gif (4.0 MB, ~19s, 1200px wide). Pipeline scripts at frontend/scripts/. README and SCREENSHOT_GUIDE updated.
Completed SG weekly reference bundle support and verification

Added drift guard tests for market code surfaces, catalog/registry exchange alias drift, BSE market-scoped ambiguity, frontend fallback catalog codes, and endpoint capability allowlists. Verified with: /Users/admin/StockScreenClaude/backend/venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/unit/domain/test_market_catalog.py tests/unit/domain/markets/test_market.py tests/unit/domain/markets/test_market_registry.py tests/unit/domain/markets/test_market_drift_guards.py tests/unit/test_provider_routing_policy.py tests/unit/test_field_capability_registry.py -q
Completed: StockUniverse has nullable listing_tier, status audit rows have event_type, and a minimal ListingTierRegistry is available for ingestion normalization.
Completed: Market Catalog now exposes canonical MIC facts, supported currencies, fallback default currency, runtime payload compatibility fields, and drift guards.
Addressed review findings with per-MIC fact declarations and drift guards, nullable metadata audit events, and scoped listing-tier alias resolution.

Completed: added Market-scoped MIC alias registry, made ambiguous aliases such as BSE require Market context, and routed MarketRegistry/SecurityMaster compatibility lookups through canonical MIC resolution.

Addressed review findings with a dedicated MarketSymbolSuffixRegistry, explicit ambiguous-alias failure in SecurityMaster, CJK suffix-registry reuse, and removal of MarketRegistry global exchange alias state.

Completed: UniverseDefinition now derives Market/Exchange/IndexName values from backend registries, validates Market/MIC/exchange/listing_tier scopes against Market Catalog, MIC aliases, IndexRegistry, and ListingTierRegistry, preserves ALL as global active rows, and resolves Market MIC/tier filters into StockUniverse queries.

Addressed review findings by deriving Market Catalog and MarketRegistry index summaries from IndexRegistry, extracting universe normalization helpers, and centralizing UniverseDefinition scan storage projection.

Completed: added ProviderDataPlanRegistry for fundamentals, migrated fundamentals routing callers to registry-backed plans, and recorded plan version provenance in data source, hybrid batch, and cache payloads.

Completed focused thermo-nuclear follow-up: routing policy version/docs now defer to ProviderDataPlan, single-symbol hybrid market inference uses canonical suffix facts and skips unsupported finviz, and get_many DB fallback attaches provider plan provenance before return/Redis warm.
